reasoning: The flagged unsafe files (moon.sh and moon.ps1) are static website installers not executed during AUR build/install. PKGBUILD uses safe pinned sources and verified build commands.
disagreement_analysis: Qwen incorrectly flagged static website installers as build risks; DeepSeek's inconclusive was due to technical error auditing an irrelevant file.
coverage_issues: Both models skipped source tarball (moon-2.3.4.tar.gz) review
Qwen missed yarn-4.12.0.cjs (DeepSeek attempted but failed)
false_positives: website/static/install/moon.sh: Static web installer not executed during build
website/static/install/moon.ps1: PowerShell equivalent not used in PKGBUILD
learnings: Improve file prioritization: Focus on PKGBUILD hooks and referenced scripts over static/web assets
Enhance model instructions: Explicitly exclude non-build files (CI/configs/web assets) unless PKGBUILD-referenced
Handle binary files: Implement lightweight heuristics for common binaries (e.g., yarn releases)
Reduce false positives: Train models to distinguish between dangerous patterns in build vs non-build contexts
